strategy: Minimize blading and shielding until your hit Round. Each blade triggers Death Oni's Putrefaction, and each shield triggers War Oni's Oni's Forge, which strips up to three shields.
Expect Plague on Round 3 from Plague Oni. A Cleanse Charm clears it before you set up.
Do your blading and hit in one burst so Putrefaction cannot cut your damage or healing first.
AoE to clear the three Onis with the boss. All take 20% resist, so no prism is needed.
Bring a hitter with AoE and let a teammate handle the Plague and the Onis' self-heals.
cheatNotes: Jade Oni blades himself with Spirit Blade.
Jade Oni attacks with Primal Oni.
Every blade you cast makes Death Oni cast Putrefaction, cutting your damage and healing. Blade the same Round you hit.
Damage-boosting globals also trigger the Putrefaction cheat.
Death Oni shields itself with Spirit Shield.
Death Oni attacks with Doom Oni.
On Round 3 Plague Oni casts Plague, weakening your whole team.
Plague Oni casts a version of Oni's Shadow that hands both a Wizard and itself a Shadow Pip without draining pips.
Every shield you cast makes War Oni cast Oni's Forge.
Oni's Forge strips up to three of your shields and heals War Oni over five Rounds per shield removed, so do not spam shields.
War Oni heals itself with Sprite.
